# anthropic_user_activity (Data Source)

Per-user activity snapshot over a date range. Enterprise plan + read:analytics scope.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_user_activity" "last_month" {
  starting_date = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD", timeadd(timestamp(), "-720h"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ending_date` (String)
- `starting_date` (String) UTC YYYY-MM-DD.
- `user_ids` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `currency` (String)
- `email_address` (String)
- `last_active_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `seat_tier` (String)
- `total_cost_amount` (String)
- `total_input_tokens` (Number)
- `total_output_tokens` (Number)
- `total_requests` (Number)
- `user_id` (String)
